summary: Tested new module_termine (GO-Workflow + Datenmaske). Backend: 24/24 pytest passed (meta, CRUD with workflow stamps, /go from wartet_auf_go AND from abgesagt, /cancel with grund, /mark-im-kalender only from bestaetigt with google_event_id, /enrich composite view with empty refs and full Kunde+Projekt+Aufgabe+Monteur joins, /wartet-auf-go for sidebar badge, stats/uebersicht counts, validation 400s on missing titel/start/invalid typ, isolation, admin delete). Frontend: /module/termine page renders, sidebar 'Termine' entry with Calendar icon visible, empty-state shown, create dialog (titel+start+typ) creates termin with status 'Wartet auf GO', GO confirm-dialog moves to 'Bestätigt', Datenmaske shows all 5 expected blocks (Termin/Kunde/Projekt/Aufgabe/Monteur). DB cleaned after testing (0 termine remaining, 0 TEST_ leftovers).

issues: Welcome toast 'Willkommen zurück!' from dashboard briefly overlaps the '+ Neuer Termin' button in the top-right corner directly after navigation; no functional blocker, only visual overlap during the first ~3s after login.

critical_code_review_comments: routes.py is clean (~380 lines, single concern). Module-First respected: writes only to db.module_termine and db.module_termine_settings; reads other collections (module_kunden, module_projekte, module_aufgaben, users) ONLY in /enrich for projection - exactly the contract requested.
Workflow guards correct: /go allows wartet_auf_go AND abgesagt (re-activation) → bestaetigt; /mark-im-kalender requires bestaetigt; /go from im_kalender returns 400. Verified by tests.
/go correctly clears abgesagt_at and abgesagt_grund when re-activating from abgesagt (line 297-298) - good housekeeping.
/enrich correctly returns null for unset references and never echoes _id (projection {_id:0, ...} on every join read).
DELETE permission: admin can delete any, non-admin only own (line 361). Non-admin path not actively tested (no non-admin fixture) - verified by code review.
Validation: PUT update_termin DOES check titel non-empty after strip() (line 268-269) - consistent with POST. (This was the gap noted for module_aufgaben in iter_50 - here it's correctly handled.)
Settings.feature_enabled is enforced by _require_enabled() on every CRUD/workflow route - good. Toggling it off would 403 the whole module cleanly.
ModuleTerminePage.jsx is 619 lines - within 700-line guideline but the TerminDialog and EnrichedView could be extracted to separate files in future for better readability.
Frontend uses onGo/onCancel/onDelete with native window.confirm/window.prompt instead of shadcn AlertDialog. Functional but UX-inconsistent with rest of app. Not a bug.

Sidebar badge logic in Navigation.jsx is correct: polls /api/module-termine/wartet-auf-go every 60s and shows red count badge next to 'Termine' menu entry only when route is NOT active (line 181 `hasBadge = badgeCount > 0 && !isActive`).
seed_data_creation: None persisted. During /enrich-join test a temporary module_aufgaben entry 'TEST_TermineJoin' was created and is auto-deleted by the helper_refs fixture teardown. All TEST_ termine deleted. Final DB: 0 module_termine docs, stats {wartet_auf_go:0, bestaetigt:0, im_kalender:0, abgesagt:0, gesamt:0}.
context_for_next_testing_agent: module_termine endpoints at /api/module-termine (prefix in server.py, NOT in routes.py). Reusable pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_module_termine.py - 24 tests, ~6s runtime, self-cleaning. UI at /module/termine; data-testids comprehensive (module-termine-page, btn-termine-reload, btn-termin-create, stat-{status}, empty-state, termine-list, termin-{id}, btn-go-{id}, btn-enrich-{id}, btn-edit-{id}, btn-delete-{id}, termin-dialog, input-titel, input-start, input-ende, input-ort, select-typ, select-kunde, select-projekt, select-aufgabe, select-monteur, btn-termin-save, enriched-dialog, badge-module/termine). Welcome toast can briefly cover the create button right after login → wait ~3s before clicking. The /go endpoint also accepts re-activation from 'abgesagt' (not just from 'wartet_auf_go') - this is intentional per code (line 287).
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - no functional bugs found. Module is production-ready. Only minor cosmetic note: dashboard welcome toast briefly overlaps top-right buttons after first login redirect.
